name: 06-22-pkcs-m3a1-quality-baseline
title: PKCS M3A1 retrieval and Context Pack quality baseline
description: Build repeatable M3 retrieval and Context Pack quality baseline evaluation over the completed M3 corpus before changing retrieval behavior.
creator: tantless
notes: Completed M3A1 baseline evaluation scaffold: M3 eval query loader/schema, baseline evaluator/report metrics, non-private query fixture, focused tests, backend spec sync, and post-Docker validation. Retrieval behavior, Context Pack selection, MCP tool names, and dependencies were unchanged.

meta.state_sync: 2026-06-22: implementation complete; focused checks and full Docker-backed pytest passed after Docker Desktop became available.
meta.baseline_observation: Chinese natural questions over mostly English corpus content currently return empty results with PostgreSQL simple FTS; English title-style smoke queries hit expected sources.
